title: Chunky Tools
description: Changes all the tools including the trident and bow to be a bit "chunky"
body:
![ChunkyTools](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1148521488744448023/1176957354504360026/chunkytoolsss.png?ex=6570c1f4&is=655e4cf4&hm=f9101d02604b70affc33895219417de9653cdec50cd12551348e21213d250392&)

This pack reimagines the Minecraft tool set and a few extra items to be a tad more ***Chunky*** in my style. hope you like it

*I have been doing pixel art for a few years now and I'm hopefully going to start releasing packs that i have in the vault*

[![My Discord](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1148521488744448023/1176964350947373177/Discord_embed.png?ex=6570c878&is=655e5378&hm=44326cc942ba99e102f8871559f4e3a2e9780108f03740a524df359bc5b27bdb&)](https://discord.gg/JNpfMDKFkE)
